text_or_summary: # Evidence Index - PDF: `raw/paper__a-systematic-review-and-meta-analysis-of-growth-mindset-interventions.pdf` - Read-through method: PDF source identity check plus targeted abstract/method/results or theory-section inspection. - Curation date: 2026-05-06. ## Evidence Map | Claim | Curated Statement | Best Source Location | |---|---|---| | C01 | Growth mindset intervention effects are heterogeneous and require moderator-sensitive interpretation. | Abstract | | C02 | Implementation fidelity is a key moderator for understanding intervention effects. | Abstract | | C03 | The source is central for self-beliefs and motivation but not direct AI-writing evidence. | Source-scope check |
